PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMIRI, PAYMAN $3,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,250.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. PLAINTIFF CAROL MANN TO RECOVER $1750 AND PLAINTIFF GERALD MANN TO RECOVER $1500
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, CALENDAR OF JAN-08-1996, OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.
